meta.name: Universal Stopper®
meta.description: Protective cover for buttons and switches
meta.heroTitle: Dome protective cover for Stopper Station series buttons and equivalents, IP54
meta.heroDescription:
Polycarbonate dome cover for manual fire alarm call points, emergency buttons, control panels and electrical devices. IP54-rated configurations provide protection against impact, dust and water spray.

Available with optional labelled hood, sounder, relay and various colour and label options. Supports flush mount, surface mount and surface mount with coloured spacer frame.

Designed for indoor and outdoor installation where protection against unauthorised access or accidental activation is required.

options.1: #1 Surface Mount - Clear/Open Backed Spacer (Dual Mount)
options.2: #2 Surface Mount with Matching Coloured Frame
